# Integrated Open-License Dataset

This directory is generated by Step 010.2.

Only the 50 manually approved Step 010.1 images are represented here. The
29 rejected candidates remain in the original Step 010.1 audit manifest and
review workbook but are excluded from all generated metadata and splits.

Every approved image is treated as one independent part group and produces
three image-text samples: MATCH, PARTIAL_MATCH, and MISMATCH.

The external test split is committed for reproducibility but remains locked.
Model training and selection may use only train and validation.
